title: helenium cordatum
intro: Helenium cordatum, also known as Sneezeweed, is a flowering plant native to North America, characterized by its yellow daisy-like flowers and slender stems. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a diaphoretic and expectorant, helping to relieve congestion and fever. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, soothing respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of various skin conditions, such as eczema and acne. Helenium cordatum is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and salves, and is also used in homeopathic remedies to promote overall well-being.
